# Lovett Counseling & Consulting

> Trauma-informed therapy and consulting for individuals, couples, and organizations.
> Whitney Lovett, MA, LPC, CCTP — Denver, Colorado. In-person and telehealth across CO.

## About

Whitney Lovett is a Licensed Professional Counselor (MA, LPC) and Certified Clinical Trauma Professional (CCTP) practicing in Denver, Colorado. Fifteen-plus years of clinical, educational, and community experience. Her approach is collaborative, relational, trauma-informed, and systems-aware — built on the belief that people heal when they feel truly seen, safe, and met where they actually are.

The practice serves:
- Adults navigating trauma, anxiety, burnout, chronic stress, life transitions, grief, and disconnection
- Couples working on communication, emotional reconnection, conflict, and relational patterns
- Schools, organizations, and helping professionals seeking trauma-informed consulting and training

## Services

- [Individual Therapy](https://lovettcounselingandconsulting.com/individual-therapy.html): Trauma-informed therapy for adults. 50-min sessions, $175. Sliding scale available; superbills provided for out-of-network reimbursement.
- [Couples Therapy](https://lovettcounselingandconsulting.com/couples-therapy.html): Trauma-informed couples work focused on communication, reconnection, conflict, and underlying relational patterns. 60-min sessions, $200.
- [Consulting & Training](https://lovettcounselingandconsulting.com/consulting.html): Trauma-informed care training, burnout and compassion fatigue, mental health education, organizational wellness, communication and conflict, staff support and debriefs for schools, nonprofits, healthcare teams, and helping professionals. By inquiry.

## Practical

- [About Whitney](https://lovettcounselingandconsulting.com/about.html): Background, approach, credentials.
- [FAQ](https://lovettcounselingandconsulting.com/faq.html): First sessions, frequency, telehealth, confidentiality, fit.
- [Fees & Insurance](https://lovettcounselingandconsulting.com/fees.html): Session rates, out-of-network superbills, sliding scale, Good Faith Estimate.
- [Contact](https://lovettcounselingandconsulting.com/contact.html): Inquiry form, email, phone, response within two business days.

## Credentials

- Master of Arts in Clinical Mental Health Counseling (MA)
- Licensed Professional Counselor (LPC) — State of Colorado
- Certified Clinical Trauma Professional (CCTP) — Evergreen Certifications
- 15+ years of clinical, educational, and community experience

## Contact

- Email: lovettcounselingandconsulting@gmail.com
- Phone: (530) 802-0437
- Location: Denver, CO (in-person and telehealth across Colorado)
- Response time: within 2 business days
- Crisis: This practice is not a crisis line. For immediate help, call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) or go to your nearest emergency room.
